cs.refresh.ownerOnly: Only the deployment owner can refresh the currency-strength snapshot.
calendar.help: Upcoming high-impact economic releases (CPI, NFP, rate decisions). Configure a FRED/BLS data source in Settings → Deployment to populate the calendar.
calendar.series.help: Full release history for this economic series — actual vs forecast vs previous. Configure a FRED/BLS data source in Settings → Deployment to populate it.
